NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS CHANGE OF FIRM NAME FILED BY ATTORNEY STRATMAN, SCOTT C
SANCTION OF $500.00 AGAINST GREGORY S. REDMOND FOR IMPROPER ATTIRE AND NOT READY FOR TRIAL. SANCTION IS PAYABLE TO COURT AND DUE MAR-19-2012. PAYMENT SHOULD BE MADE DIRECTLY TO DEPT. 206. (206)

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-12-2012 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ON AUG-06-2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. GREGORY S. REDMOND APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. SCOTT STRATMAN APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. THE MATTER WAS PASSED FOR NON-APPEARANCE OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AND THE COURT ASKED MR. STRATMAN TO CONTACT COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF. AT AROUND 10:12AM, THE MATTER WAS RECALLED AND MR. REDMOND APOLOGIZED TO THE COURT FOR BEING LATE. MR. REDMOND REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF AN EXPERT. THE COURT LEVIED SANCTIONS AGAINST MR. GREGORY REDMOND IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR APPEARING UNPROFESSIONAL BEFORE THE COURT AND ANOTHER $250.00 FOR NOT BEING PREPARED TO GO TO TRIAL. THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IS $500.00 AGAINST MR. REDMOND THAT WILL BE PAYABLE IN ONE WEEK AND THE CHECK IS TO BE DELIVERED TO DEPT. 206. THE TRIAL DATE OF 3/12/12 IS CONTINUED TO 8/6/12 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. NOTICE IS WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
